allow: PowerShell(& python -c "import numpy as np; d = np.load\(r'E:\\1A DATN REAL\\primary beam\\UFRAME_primary_beam_610MHz.npz'\); print\('Keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('freq_MHz:', float\(d['freq_MHz']\)\); print\('gain_max_dBi:', float\(d['gain_max_dBi']\)\); print\('gain_dBi shape:', d['gain_dBi'].shape\); print\('gain_dBi min/max:', round\(float\(d['gain_dBi'].min\(\)\),2\), round\(float\(d['gain_dBi'].max\(\)\),2\)\)")
